This is placeholder content for an example post. The site is an anonymized
copy of a real Quiqr/Hugo site, kept as a test fixture so the storage and
schema layers can be exercised against a realistic on-disk shape.

> Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet.

The text here is intentionally generic; the structure (front matter, the
`quiqr/model/` schema, the content tree) is what the fixture exercises.
